message:
fix: agent pattern false positives, nested redaction, conflict ID collisions

Agent patterns:
- Claude idle: ^>\s* → ^>\s*$ (require bare prompt line, not any > prefix)
- Gemini memory: (\d+\.?\d*)\s*MB → /model\s*\|\s*(\d+\.?\d*)\s*MB
  (require Gemini status line context)
- Guard getLastNLines against n<=0

Event redaction (security):
- redactDataMap now recursively redacts nested map/slice/string structures
  via redactValue(). Previously only top-level strings were redacted.

Conflict IDs:
- Replace UnixNano()%10000 with monotonic counter appended to nanos
  (conflict-NANOS-COUNTER-pattern) to prevent duplicate IDs in same
  10-microsecond window.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
